REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (111 Hahn St. San Francisco, Ca 94134)
Off Calendar May-21-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jennifer Brown for (Co-Administrator) Ann Ridge. Paul Melbostad for and with (Co-Administrator) Yates Watson.

The Court stated that it has received the qualified reappraisal but does not have a signature of the co-administrator on the inventory & appraisal. Ms. Brown stated that the co-administrator is present and committed to the sale. Mr. Watson stated that he has no objection to proceeding with the sale. The court stated that going forward it expects the co-executors to work together and further stated that notice was not given to Mr. Davis directly, only through his agent. Mr. Davis is present in court and stated that he waives notice. The sale was confirmed at $625,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed May 4, 2015. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond is not required.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

For Permission To Enter Into Exclusive Listing Agreement For Sale Of Real Property
Off Calendar Dec-16-2014 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jul-23-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jennifer Brown for and with Ann Ridge, petitioner. Paul Melbostad for Yates Watson, Sytheanah Baylor, and Syanannah Baylor, petitioners.

Counsel indicated that they do not think there is a need to amend the petition, that all parties entitled to notice have signed the settlement agreement, that everyone waived bond and that Yvette Ridge did not sign the settlement agreement because she is the next generation. Both petitions for letters of administration were taken under submission with the idea that Ann and Yates will be appointed.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-23-2014 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar May-14-2014 Continued To Jul-15-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jennifer Brown for and with Ann Ridge and Jeron Ridge. Paul Melbostad for and with Yates Watson and Tina Baylor.

The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than July 11, 2014. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by July 11, 2014. Both Petitions for Letters of Administration were continued to and the Parties are to return on July 15, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. Ms. Brown stated that Jeron resides in the property, that insurance is current, that taxes are due and that there are no funds in the Estate to pay them. Ms. Brown also stated that no rent has been paid and that they can establish fair market rent.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Jones. (Not Reported)
